news.t: Invesco launches US climate-focused ETF with $1.6 bln in Finnish funding
Invesco Launches the Invesco MSCI Global Climate 500 ETF (KLMT)

holdings.infoBox: KLMT is an equity ETF with a total of 516 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 4.76%, Apple at 4.37%, Microsoft at 2.77%, Alphabet at 2.39%, and Amazon.com at 2.36%.

overview.description: The Invesco MSCI Global Climate 500 ETF (KLMT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI ACWI Select 500 index. The fund tracks an index of 500 global equities that meet specific ESG criteria. The index selects and weights securities through an optimization process designed to minimize the exposure to climate change risks. KLMT was launched on Jun 26, 2024 and is issued by Invesco.
